prestazioni: M54B30 (3.0L I6) engine with a Schrick 264/256° camshaft upgrade for increased lift and duration, paired with Supertech +1mm oversized valves (33.5mm intake, 29.5mm exhaust) and titanium retainers to optimize high-RPM airflow and reduce valvetrain weight

Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom Precision Turbo wastegate (44mm external) and a CSF Racing M54B30-specific front-mount intercooler (5.5" thick core) to support 12-14 psi of boost on 98 RON fuel, mated to a Vibrant 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust with a GESI 300-cell metallic catalytic converter

M54B30 forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods (5.500" length), and a Precision Race Components billet crankshaft (86.5mm stroke), paired with an ARP Custom Age 625+ head stud kit and a Reinz MLS head gasket for 250+ whp reliability
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (E46-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) and a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with matte gold accents on the kidney grilles and mirror caps

OEM+ M3 CSL-style front bumper with a custom carbon fiber splitter (3M 2080 series adhesive) and a custom 2.5" aluminum rear diffuser from 3D Carbon, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF103 19x9.5" ET22 (front) and 19x10.5" ET25 (rear) concave forged wheels in Hyper Silver with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/35/19 front, 275/30/19 rear)

Custom interior: Recaro SPG XL seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses) with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), a custom roll cage (MCS Motorsport bolt-in half-cage with harness bar), and a full Alcantara headliner (Eurobahn custom install) with red contrast stitching
